subcodes.first_line: If anyone should inquire of the Wronged One, say: Under the lash of tyranny there befell Him that which every discerning eye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر نفسی از مظلوم سوال نمود بگو تحت سیاط ظلم وارد شد بر او آنچه که هر بصیری
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
